introSection: Grand Prix Racers is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently located at Gulliver's Valley Resort in Rotherham, South Yorkshire, England, UK.
fullText: Grand Prix Racers is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently located at Gulliver's Valley Resort in Rotherham, South Yorkshire, England, UK.
